metadata.title: Tight Angles and Clean Shots Secure This Mid Round Win in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a quick mid round play where sharp positioning and timing made the difference. Love fast-paced FPS action? This clip has you covered.

Tell me your favorite agent to hold mid in the comments!

Like if you want to see more crisp VALORANT moments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
